children.heading: Applicability
children.label: a Applicability
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, in carrying out a research, development, demonstration, or commercial application program or activity that is initiated after , the Secretary shall require cost-sharing in accordance with this section.August 8, 2005

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraphs (2), (3), and (4) and subsection (f), the Secretary shall require not less than 20 percent of the cost of a research or development activity described in subsection (a) to be provided by a non-Federal source.

children.heading: Exclusion
children.label: 2 Exclusion
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to a research or development activity described in subsection (a) that is of a basic or fundamental nature, as determined by the appropriate officer of the Department.

children.heading: Reduction
children.label: 3 Reduction
children.text: The Secretary may reduce or eliminate the requirement of paragraph (1) for a research and development activity of an applied nature if the Secretary determines that the reduction is necessary and appropriate.

children.heading: Exemption for institutions of higher education and other nonprofit institutions
children.label: 4 Exemption for institutions of higher education and other nonprofit institutions

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply to a research or development activity performed by an institution of higher education or nonprofit institution (as defined in section 4 of the Stevenson-Wydler Technology Innovation Act of 1980 ()).15 U.S.C. 3703

children.heading: Termination date
children.label: B Termination date
children.text: The exemption under subparagraph (A) shall apply during the 2-year period beginning on .August 9, 2022

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2) and subsection (f), the Secretary shall require that not less than 50 percent of the cost of a demonstration or commercial application activity described in subsection (a) to be provided by a non-Federal source.1So in original. The word “to” probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Reduction of non-Federal share
children.label: 2 Reduction of non-Federal share
children.text: The Secretary may reduce the non-Federal share required under paragraph (1) if the Secretary determines the reduction to be necessary and appropriate, taking into consideration any technological risk relating to the activity.

children.label: A
children.text: cash;

children.label: B
children.text: personnel costs;

children.label: C
children.text: the value of a service, other resource, or third party in-kind contribution determined in accordance with the applicable circular of the Office of Management and Budget;

children.label: D
children.text: indirect costs or facilities and administrative costs; or

children.label: E
children.text: any funds received under the power program of the Tennessee Valley Authority (except to the extent that such funds are made available under an annual appropriation Act); and

children.label: A
children.text: revenues or royalties from the prospective operation of an activity beyond the time considered in the award;

children.label: B
children.text: proceeds from the prospective sale of an asset of an activity; or

children.label: C
children.text: other appropriated Federal funds.

children.heading: Repayment of Federal share
children.label: e Repayment of Federal share
children.text: The Secretary shall not require repayment of the Federal share of a cost-shared activity under this section as a condition of making an award.
a cooperative research and development agreement under the Stevenson-Wydler Technology Innovation Act of 1980 ( et seq.);15 U.S.C. 3701
a fee charged for the use of a Department facility; or

children.text: the small business innovation research program under ; orsection 638 of title 15
